title: Mahjong Solitaire: World Tour
description: Mahjong Solitaire: World Tour elevates tile-matching. Solve levels to explore global cities in a journey through time. With striking graphics and smooth gameplay, its a must for puzzle lovers. Start your ultimate Mahjong adventure today!
instructions: Remove matching tiles by tapping them but remember that only unblocked tiles can be picked ldquo Unblocked rdquo tiles are tiles that have an open edge and nothing on top of it
